seoTitle: How to Change the Video Block Ratio in Squarespace
metaDescription: Adjust the video block ratio in Squarespace so your embedded videos display correctly and fit your site's overall design.
intro: Video blocks that don't match your site's layout can throw off an otherwise clean design, which is why getting the aspect ratio right matters. This guide covers how to adjust the video block ratio in Squarespace so your media content displays properly across devices. It's useful for businesses showcasing product videos, artists sharing portfolios, or educators posting instructional content.

steps.heading: Access video block settings
steps.body: Open the video block on your page where the ratio and display settings are located.

steps.heading: Change the video ratio
steps.body: Adjust the aspect ratio setting so your video fits properly within its block and matches your site's layout.

steps.heading: Select the right ratio for your content
steps.body: Choose a ratio that suits the type of video you're presenting, since different content may call for different proportions.

steps.heading: Maintain visual consistency
steps.body: Apply similar ratios across video blocks on your site so the overall look stays cohesive as visitors browse.

steps.heading: Troubleshoot display issues
steps.body: If a video looks stretched or cropped, revisit the ratio settings to find a better fit for that specific piece of content.

faq.question: Why does the video block ratio matter?
faq.answer: The right ratio keeps your video from appearing stretched, cropped, or mismatched with the rest of your site's design.

faq.question: Does this work for all types of video content?
faq.answer: Yes, the process applies to product videos, portfolio pieces, and instructional content alike, though the ideal ratio may vary by content type.

faq.question: Will changing the ratio affect video quality?
faq.answer: Adjusting the ratio changes how the video is framed within its block rather than altering the underlying video quality.

faq.question: Can I use different ratios for different videos on my site?
faq.answer: Yes, you can select the ratio that best suits each individual video block based on its content.
